subject: A curved cutlass sword resting on a wet sandy beach near the water's edge, its blade catching the light
description: A single-edged curved cutlass with a dark hilt and crossguard lies abandoned on a stretch of pale, wet sand. The blade is angled diagonally across the frame, polished metal reflecting muted light. Shallow water laps at the upper portion of the scene, suggesting a tideline. The composition is a still-life with no figures present — just the weapon, sand, and the suggestion of an ocean shore. The palette is desaturated browns, tans, and steely greys, with a moody overcast atmosphere.
foreground: curved cutlass blade on wet sand
background: shoreline with shallow water and damp sand
